rows.label: tlk70000123_10_msg0001
rows.name:
Hello Drivers! Hello all!
Dolala have request!

rows.label: tlk70000123_10_msg0002
rows.name:
Maybe... If possible... Will
you be friends with Dolala?

rows.label: tlk70000123_10_msg0003
rows.name:
Dolala's number one heroes are
first-class Drivers and Laura-sama,
who was even given a knight's title!

rows.label: tlk70000123_10_msg0004
rows.name:
So want to talk lots with you!
Get to know each other well!

rows.label: tlk70000123_10_msg0005
rows.name:
Mo! You will! Wow! Dolala
so very, very happy!

rows.label: tlk70000123_10_msg0006
rows.name:
Dolala will definitely
become kind and gentle
Driver like you! Thank you!
